name: Impossible Cranberry-Orange Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease a pie plate that is 10 x 1-1/2 inches.
3. Sprinkle the frozen cranberry-orange relish evenly in the prepared pie plate.
4. In a blender or hand beater, beat together the remaining ingredients except whipped cream until smooth. Blend for 30 seconds on high speed or whisk for 1 minute.
5. Pour the batter into the pie plate.
6. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the pie to cool completely.
8. Refrigerate for at least 6 hours but no longer than 24 hours before serving.
9. Garnish with whipped cream before serving.
